name: Maya Bazaar - For Sale
overview: High expectations of the buyers turn upside down when "Maya Bazaar", a gated community’s brand ambassador – a celebrity actor Abhijeet - falls dead from the terrace of the clubhouse on the inauguration day. On the same day, the residents also come to know that the entire property is illegal and their hope for a peaceful life comes to a standstill when the government declares the construction illegal.
